name: Anna University
description: State Technical University of Tamil Nadu established in 1978. Issues engineering and technology degrees.

name: IIT Madras
description: Indian Institute of Technology Madras — premier engineering institution under the Ministry of Education.

name: CBSE
description: Central Board of Secondary Education — national level board of education for public and private schools.

name: NIC
description: National Informatics Centre — issues government IT training and certification documents.

name: UGC
description: University Grants Commission — regulatory body for higher education institutions in India.
